name: Blondie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a 9-inch pizza pan or cake pan.
3. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt butter and 1 cup of the chocolate chips, stirring until smooth. Remove from heat and let cool to lukewarm.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and baking soda into a small bowl. Set aside.
5. Place sugars in a large bowl. Add cooled chocolate mixture, vanilla, and orange extract, stirring until well blended.
6. Whisk together Egg and condensed milk and blend into the chocolate mixture.
7. Stir in the flour mixture by hand, beating 50 strokes. Fold in all remaining chocolate chips.
8. Spread batter to a thickness of 1/4 inch in the pan.
9. Bake for 6 minutes or until the crust springs back when lightly touched in the center.
10. Cool completely.
